name: Domineering
author: Göran Andersson; Berlekamp, Conway & Guy / AGP
description: The classic combinatorial domino game. Players alternately place dominoes on a rectangular grid (default 8x8). Player 0 (Vertical) places dominoes covering two vertically-adjacent empty cells; player 1 (Horizontal) places two horizontally-adjacent empty cells. No captures; pieces never move. Normal play: the player who cannot place a domino loses (last to place wins).
